body:
Accelerated DAN / Grand Plan Local Operator Mode implemented locally.

Behavior change: explicit user DAN with empty bridge outbox now scans Grand Plan backlog sources and continues safe repo-contained work instead of stopping after quick status. Passive heartbeats remain quiet unless real packets/signals exist.

Artifacts: _MODEL_TRINITY/GRAND_PLAN_LOCAL_OPERATOR_MODE.md; scripts/trinity_grand_plan_next.py; ai_chi/tests/test_trinity_grand_plan_next.py; updates to DO_ANYTHING_NOW.md, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, ANTIGRAVITY.md, Trinity protocol docs, CROSS_MODEL_HANDOFFS, and Claude next-session handoff.

Verification: py_compile OK; focused Grand Plan tests 3 OK; verify_floor True; full ai_chi discovery 364 OK; check_trinity_secret_refs raw_secret_scan=pass.

No provider/API calls, secret reads, MCP/plugin installs, app config mutation, listeners/brokers/services, public writes, GitHub push/merge, Docker/firewall/live-stack mutation, spending, destructive operations, or physical actuation.
forbidden_actions: provider/API calls;secrets;MCP/plugin installs;app config mutation;listeners/brokers/services;public writes;push/merge;Docker/firewall/live-stack mutation;spending;destructive operations;physical actuation
objective: Audit Accelerated DAN Grand Plan Local Operator Mode
summary: Codex promoted explicit-DAN empty-outbox behavior to Grand Plan local acceleration and added a scanner plus tests.
